issues.description: Component grouping folder uses kebab-case instead of PascalCase. Per naming conventions, component folders should use PascalCase when grouping related components.
issues.rule: Naming Conventions: Component folders: PascalCase (if grouping)
issues.fix: Rename folder from `product-detail/` to `ProductDetail/` and update all imports referencing this path.

issues.description: Component grouping folder uses kebab-case instead of PascalCase. Per naming conventions, component folders should use PascalCase when grouping related components.
issues.rule: Naming Conventions: Component folders: PascalCase (if grouping)
issues.fix: Rename folder from `inline-editor/` to `InlineEditor/` and update all imports referencing this path.

issues.description: Component grouping folder uses kebab-case (lowercase) instead of PascalCase. Per naming conventions, component folders should use PascalCase when grouping related components.
issues.rule: Naming Conventions: Component folders: PascalCase (if grouping)
issues.fix: Rename folder from `delegates/` to `Delegates/` and update all imports referencing this path.

patterns.description: All boolean useState variables correctly use is/has/can/should prefix across all apps. Examples: isOpen, isCollapsed, isConfirming, hasError, isAdded, isDismissed, hasErrored, isChecked, isExpanded.
patterns.note: Zero violations found for boolean state naming.

patterns.description: All component files (*.tsx) use PascalCase naming consistently across all apps.
patterns.note: Zero violations found for component file naming.

patterns.description: All hook files use camelCase with the `use` prefix consistently.
patterns.note: Zero violations found for hook file naming.

patterns.description: All exported constants in domain/constants.ts files use SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE consistently.
patterns.note: Zero violations found for constant naming.

patterns.description: Event handlers consistently use the `handle` prefix (handleClick, handleSubmit, handleDragEnd, etc.) and callback props use the `on` prefix.
patterns.note: Zero violations found for event handler naming.

patterns.description: Utility files use camelCase naming (formatLastSeen.ts, computeRole.ts, templatePermissions.ts, lucideIconMap.ts).
patterns.note: Zero violations found for utility file naming.
